text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
It sure was fun. I made so many memories. It was
like summer vacation!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
We all tried to make fireworks together, and then
Air Groove yelled at us!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
We buried a time capsule, but nobody
remembered to write down the location!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
We went into the mountain on a dare, got chased
by something, and spent the night trembling in
fear in a random hut!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: What a summer. It was so fun.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
...And the director said such nice things to me
too.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I still don't know which way I should go or what
my goal should be...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
But for now, I just want to do my best in the
Kikuka Sho! Mun.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Oh, that's right! I actually tried coming up with my
own training regimen!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
There's also a weight lifting routine I want to try
out starting today! Let's have a meeting about it
when we get back!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She seems quite motivated for the Kikuka Sho!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Still, isn't everyone running kinda late? I'm sure
it's about time to leave...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Ah, I misread the bus schedule. We've still got
another hour.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At any rate, with the next step in our journey
slowly coming into view, this year's summer camp
comes to a close.
